content.en:
In a flash, another period of time has passed.

"The Supreme Legend Body controls forty percent!"

Ye Tian made some progress again, and his strength increased again.

This kind of rapid improvement speed made Ye Tiandu very excited, according to this speed, he could at least quickly improve to the level of controlling seven or eight percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, but it was still very difficult to control ten percent of the Supreme Legendary Body.

If it wasn't too difficult, the Lord of Stone Mountain would have already controlled ten percent of the supreme legendary body, but in fact, the other party didn't.

However, Ye Tian at least saw hope, and after spending some more years, there was still hope that he would master ten percent of the supreme legend body.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered the silver-white giant ape again at the end of the realm, and judging from the breath, it was the same one.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was directly killed by the other party, but now Ye Tian is no longer afraid of it.

A strong battle intent diffused from Ye Tian's body, and the silver-white giant ape was also full of battle intent and killing intent.

The battle broke out in an instant!

Bang!!!

Ye Tian fought with this silver giant ape, and a door time and space control technique was displayed in Ye Tian's hands, and the attack of the silver and white giant ape was much simpler, that is, to smash everything with one punch.

The power of this punch is comparable to the space-time control technique, plus the opponent's strength is too strong, and the defense is also very terrifying, so the combat power is very fierce.

Ye Tian cast a thousand true bodies, and his whole body became extremely huge, just like two behemoths fighting at the end of the realm.

Ye Tian's strength is indeed very strong, but the strength of the silver-white giant ape is also extremely terrifying, so there is no difference between victory and defeat for a while.

In the end, Ye Tian still relied on many space-time control techniques, and he was slightly better.

The silver-white giant ape mainly has too single attack methods, which is why it has fallen into disadvantage.

However, Ye Tian did not kill the silver-white giant ape, and the other party turned into a white light and fled.

Ye Tian didn't continue to chase and kill, because it was difficult to kill him.

In the end, Ye Tian stayed at the end of the realm for some more years, and he didn't gain much, so he left here.

......

"Next, you can go to the magic capital mountain and water!"

Modu Mountain is a place that the half-tooth master mainly recommends to go to, but if the strength is not in the half-step eternal master, it is not recommended that Ye Tian go there.

Now, Ye Tian's strength is already very strong, so he is naturally qualified to go there.

The Demon Capital Mountain is actually the territory of a certain Eternal Master, but an extremely strange Eternal Controller of the Life Achievement of the Boundary River, known as the Demon Mountain Master, it is quite evil, if a half-step Eternal Master with no background goes there, it will be directly devoured by him.

Of course, the other party is also very timid and will not offend other Eternal Masters.

As a result, there is no Eternal Master to deal with it, and it is rumored to have some relationship with a top Eternal Master, so everyone gives it a little face, and it also gives face to other Eternal Masters.

If a half-step Eternal Master, who has the mark of the Eternal Master, goes to the Demon Capital Mountain, the other party will not devour it, but it will not help.

Demon Capital Mountain is not only a treasure land of great chance, but also a very dangerous place, and there is a high possibility that the weaker half-step Eternal Masters will fall.

The rules of the Demon Capital Mountain are very special, full of strange powers, and there are also many monsters born in it, these monsters have strong bloodlines, no less than the life of the boundary river, and there are many top half-step eternal controllers.

But even if it was very dangerous, it also attracted many half-step Eternal Masters, because the Demon Ancient Flower was born in the Demon Capital Mountain, and this Demon Ancient Flower was a very rare treasure that could enhance the Eighth-Order Eternal Will.

If there are enough Demon Ancient Flowers, there is even hope that the Eternal Will will will be raised from the early stage of the eighth order to the middle stage of the eighth order.

If it weren't for the fact that the Ancient Flower was of little use to the Eternal Master, the Eternal Master would have picked the Ancient Flower as well.

"I should have the mark of the Eternal Controller, maybe it was the Half-Tooth Master, or it could be the Great Being, but no matter who it is, I enter the Demon Capital Mountain, and it is impossible for the Demon Mountain Master to attack me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

A replica body of Ye Tian went to Modu Mountain.

After some time, Ye Tian arrived at the Demon Capital Mountain.

I saw a black giant mountain floating on top of a black ocean, and the breath of this black ocean made Ye Tian recognize it.

"Isn't this the Silent Sea, there is one here, and it's even bigger than the one outside the Void Zone. "

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Black Sea of Silence is also a special kind of life, but it is not conscious.

Obviously, this Silent Sea is even stronger.

Even the Eternal Controllers of the Silent Sea have no way to destroy its mysterious special creatures, and if anyone can control the Black Silent Sea, it will be really awesome.

Ye Tian entered the Black Silent Sea, the power here could no longer cause harm to him, if he was weak, he would not be able to enter here.

Passing through the Black Silent Sea, Ye Tian finally arrived at the Demon Capital Mountain.

Meanwhile.

In the depths of Modu Mountain, a pair of huge pupils spied Ye Tian's existence through time and space.

"There's another little guy here, and I'll see if it has anything to do with the other Eternal Masters. "

This is the master of the Magic Mountain.

Airplanes!!!

The aura on Ye Tian's body was peeped at by him one by one, and suddenly he spied an incomparably terrifying imprint aura.

Suddenly, the person in control of the Demon Mountain was so frightened that he withdrew his gaze.

"It has something to do with the Ten Elements Ancestor, it should be one of the inheritors of the Ten Elements Ancestor, this cultivator can't eat it!"

The master of the Demon Mountain said secretly.

He didn't dare to eat the inheritor of the Ten Elements Ancestor, that was looking for death, the Ten Elements Ancestor was separated by a boundary river, and a single look could kill him in seconds.

The Ten Elements Ancestor can be called an invincible existence among the many boundary rivers, and it is an existence that is truly at the pinnacle.

"This little ancestor, can't let him fall here, even if the doppelganger falls, what if he holds a grudge in the future? This time, you have to take good care of him, it's best to give him a little benefit. "

The Demon Mountain Ruler thought to himself.

And Ye Tian didn't know at all, just a mark, so that the master of the Demon Mountain was so frightened that he arranged (Zhao's) place, if he knew, he was afraid that he would laugh so much that his stomach hurt.

Invisibly, the opportunity is about to come to him.

Soon.

Ye Tian entered the Demon Capital Mountain, and also met the monsters of the Demon Capital Mountain.

These monsters exude a strange black qi all over their bodies, these black gases are enough to corrode the flesh of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the speed and strength of these monsters are very fast, the strength of each monster is no less than that of the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, many monsters are above the fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord, as for the half-step Eternal Master-level monsters, there are few.

Buzz !! Department!

One monster after another rushed towards Ye Tian.

But just as Ye Tian used his means to bombard and kill a piece of monsters, the other weak monsters fled one by one, it seemed that his wisdom was not low, and he also knew that he was afraid of the soft and the hard, and he knew that Ye Tian was strong, so he naturally did not dare to attack Ye Tian.

But those powerful monsters are not afraid of Ye Tian, if he goes deeper, he will still be attacked. _
